caption: The video displays a presentation slide with a white background and a yellow header and footer. The main text at the top reads "Decide critical elements upfront," accompanied by a large yellow number "4." Below this, three yellow icons are aligned horizontally: a group of people, a small organizational chart, and a wallet. Each icon is paired with a specific question: "How will the boards work together?", "What does each need from the other?", and "Can CPA funds pay for administrative costs of the trust?". In the top right corner, a small video inset shows a man wearing a dark suit and tie speaking. The "MHP" logo appears in the bottom corners of the slide. Across the frames, the content of the slide and the position of the speaker remain completely static, indicating a still shot of a presentation.
